<!--
Thanks for sending a pull request. Please fill in the sections below.
Delete anything that doesn't apply.
-->

## Summary

<!--
What does this change? Keep it to a couple of sentences focused on
the "why", not the "what" (the diff already shows the what).
-->

## Related issues

<!--
Reference any issues this closes. For upstream issues, use the full URL:

Closes #<number> (this repo)
Closes https://github.com/hoaphantn7604/react-native-element-dropdown/issues/<number>
-->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Docs or tooling only

## Test plan

<!--
How did you verify this works? What's the reviewer supposed to run?
-->

- [ ] `yarn lint`
- [ ] `yarn typecheck`
- [ ] `yarn test`
- [ ] `yarn prepack` (build still emits correct `lib/`)
- [ ] Manual check in the example app on iOS / Android / Web (when UI-affecting)

## Docs

- [ ] Component prop tables in `website/docs/components/` updated
- [ ] A new guide or recipe added if this introduces a non-obvious workflow
- [ ] No docs change needed

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated, or explicitly not applicable
- [ ] If this fixes or closes an upstream issue, I updated
      [`docs/upstream-triage.md`](../blob/master/docs/upstream-triage.md)
- [ ] The public API is unchanged (drop-in migration is intentional)
